# 508.dev

> 508.dev is an AI-native engineering co-op connecting companies with vetted offshore developers.

508.dev provides offshore engineering talent and delivery support across frontend, backend, AI/ML, data science, and blockchain. The company emphasizes high engineering standards, co-op ownership, and modern AI coding workflows.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://508.dev/) - Company overview, positioning, and service summary.
- [Pricing](https://508.dev/pricing) - Pricing model and engagement framing.
- [Portfolio](https://508.dev/portfolio) - Project examples and case-study-style summaries.
- [Members](https://508.dev/members) - Public directory of engineers and skills.
- [Join](https://508.dev/join) - Membership and contribution process.
- [Extended LLM Context](https://508.dev/llms-full.txt) - Expanded machine-readable summary for AI agents.

## Services

- Offshore frontend engineering
- Offshore backend engineering
- AI and machine learning engineering
- Data science
- Blockchain development

## Contact

- Email: hello@508.dev
- Book a chat: https://cal.com/calebjay/30m

## Notes

- 508.dev is organized as an engineering co-op.
- The company positions itself as AI-native and current on modern AI coding tools and workflows.
